title: BCH - Bitcoin Cash (BCH) Cashaddr to Legacy address

actions.value:
Edge supports the latest bitcoin cash address type called CashAddr. Not all services are compatible with this yet and you'll need to convert your receiving address into a legacy address. You can do that in the wallet by tapping on the three dot menu on the Receive screen (the screen that shows your QR code) and tap "Use Legacy Address".


For more information about the CashAddr address type please read this blog post from bitcoinabc.org https://www.bitcoinabc.org/cashaddr

raw_title: BCH - Bitcoin Cash (BCH) Cashaddr to Legacy address
